160 
SR_SCRNG_BEFORE_DRNG_AFTR_CD 
LABEL: 
Did Screening Occur Before, During, or After the Visit 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Did screening occur before, during, or after the visit. 
LONG NAME: SR_SCRNG_BEFORE_DRNG_AFTR_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
1 = Before clinical visit 
2 = During clinical visit 
3 = After clinical visit 
Missing
